# PERF-106 negative: plain map guarded by sync.Mutex
lang: go
file: PERF-106-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sync"

type Entry struct {
	Key   string
	Value int
}

func UseMap() {
	var mu sync.Mutex
	m := make(map[Entry]int, 1024)
	for i := 0; i < 1000; i++ {
		mu.Lock()
		m[Entry{Key: "k", Value: i}] = i
		mu.Unlock()
	}
	mu.Lock()
	_ = m[Entry{Key: "k"}]
	mu.Unlock()
}
